design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Hades through its core roguelike loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Dash-i-frame combat with god boon tags stacking into build archetypes; boss patterns telegraph clearly per attempt.
constraints: Boon choices are offer-limited per chamber
Heat modifiers optional for veteran challenge
gdd_outline.core_loop: Choose chamber routes, fight real-time encounters, pick boons and upgrades, die and return to the House, spend meta currency on mirror talents and weapons, and push farther with story unlocks.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Darkness and gems fund meta; bones and chamber rewards fund mid-run shops and wells.
gdd_outline.overview: Hades is a roguelike action game where Zagreus escapes the underworld through procedural chambers, building boon synergies each run while advancing relationships in the House between deaths.
player_goals: Unlock weapon aspects and mirror talents
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Mirror of Night and weapon aspects persist; boons and chamber rewards are run-scoped.

mechanics.expression: In Hades, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.
mechanics.map_notes: In Hades, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.

mechanics.expression: In Hades, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.map_notes: In Hades, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.expression: In Hades, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.
mechanics.map_notes: In Hades, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.

mechanics.expression: In Hades, conversation branches alter relationships, story flags, and available quests.
mechanics.map_notes: In Hades, conversation branches alter relationships, story flags, and available quests.

mechanics.expression: In Hades, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.
mechanics.map_notes: In Hades, a progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.

narrative.core_loop: Fight through randomized chambers, choose boons and upgrades, die and return to the hub, and advance story with NPC interactions between runs.
narrative.description: Hades is a roguelike action game where Zagreus escapes the underworld through procedural runs, earning boons and narrative progression.

variables.map_notes: Death defiance extends effective health pool.
Bones spent at wells and mid-run shops.
